tree.name: Nikola Vucevic
tree.tradeDescription: Celtics trade Simons + 2026 2nd to Bulls for Vucevic + 2027 2nd (DEN own)

assetsGivenUp.name: Anfernee Simons
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Celtics acquire Simons for Jrue Holiday. Boston also received trade exception.
assetsGivenUp.note: Simons had brief Celtics tenure before being flipped for Vucevic

assetsGivenUp.name: Jrue Holiday
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Part of Damian Lillard mega-trade. Celtics give up Brogdon, Rob Williams, 2024 1st (GSW), 2029 1st
assetsGivenUp.note: 2024 NBA Champion - key two-way player in title run

assetsGivenUp.name: Malcolm Brogdon
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Celtics acquire Brogdon for Nesmith, Theis, and 2023 1st
assetsGivenUp.note: 2023 6th Man of the Year

assetsGivenUp.name: Aaron Nesmith
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted with pick acquired from Memphis (Jeff Green trade)

assetsGivenUp.name: 2020 1st Round Pick (#14) via MEM
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Jeff Green trade. Pick was heavily protected, finally conveyed in 2020 as #14

assetsGivenUp.name: Jeff Green
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Celtics acquire Green for Kendrick Perkins and Nate Robinson
assetsGivenUp.note: Green missed 2012 season for heart surgery

assetsGivenUp.name: Kendrick Perkins
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Draft night trade. Celtics send Dahntay Jones + Troy Bell for Marcus Banks + Perkins
assetsGivenUp.note: Perkins was key to 2008 championship, tore ACL in 2010 Finals Game 6

assetsGivenUp.name: Dahntay Jones
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted with pick acquired from 76ers (Moïso trade)

assetsGivenUp.name: 2003 1st Round Pick (#20) via PHI
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Celtics trade Jérôme Moïso for Roshown McLeod and lottery-protected 1st

assetsGivenUp.name: Jérôme Moïso
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted by Celtics with their OWN pick
assetsGivenUp.note: THE ULTIMATE ORIGIN. Celtics drafted Moïso 11th overall out of UCLA. Massive bust - played 24 games, averaged 1.5 PPG. His selection started a 26-year chain.

assetsGivenUp.name: Troy Bell
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted by Celtics with their OWN pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Part of package for Perkins. Never played in NBA. Celtics own pick.

assetsGivenUp.name: Nate Robinson
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Celtics trade Eddie House, Bill Walker, J.R. Giddens, and conditional 2014 2nd (did not convey) to Knicks for Nate Robinson and Marcus Landry
assetsGivenUp.note: 3x Slam Dunk champion. Traded from NYK to BOS mid-season 2010.

assetsGivenUp.name: Eddie House
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Signed as free agent (1yr/$1.5M). Part of 2008 championship team as backup guard.
assetsGivenUp.note: Sharpshooter off the bench. Won 2008 title with Celtics.

assetsGivenUp.name: Bill Walker
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Celtics acquired draft rights to Bill Walker (#47 pick) from Wizards for cash considerations
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted #47 by Washington, rights immediately traded to Boston for cash

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash Considerations
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Cash sent to Washington for Bill Walker's draft rights

assetsGivenUp.name: J.R. Giddens
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted by Celtics with their OWN pick (#30 overall)
assetsGivenUp.note: Last pick of 1st round. Spent most of time in G-League. Never made NBA impact.

assetsGivenUp.name: Daniel Theis
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Re-acquired from Houston in deadline deal for Schroder, Freedom, Fernando
assetsGivenUp.note: Originally signed by Celtics as free agent 2017, traded to Bulls 2021, returned 2022

assetsGivenUp.name: Dennis Schroder
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Signed 1yr/$5.9M deal as free agent after Lakers stint
assetsGivenUp.note: German guard, previously with Lakers. Free agent signing - TRUE ORIGIN.

assetsGivenUp.name: Enes Freedom
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Signed veteran minimum as free agent
assetsGivenUp.note: Previously Enes Kanter, changed name 2021. Free agent - TRUE ORIGIN.

assetsGivenUp.name: Bruno Fernando
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Signed as free agent after Hawks waived him
assetsGivenUp.note: Minor role player signed off waivers. Salary filler in Theis trade - TRUE ORIGIN.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2023 1st Round Pick (#26)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Celtics own pick (#29)
assetsGivenUp.note: Conveyed to Indiana in Brogdon trade. Pacers selected Ben Sheppard.

assetsGivenUp.name: Robert Williams III
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted by Celtics with their OWN pick
assetsGivenUp.note: Time Lord. 2024 NBA Champion (traded after). Celtics own pick - TRUE ORIGIN.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 1st Round Pick (#14)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Originally GSW pick acquired by Celtics. Conveyed to Portland.
assetsGivenUp.note: Portland selected Bub Carrington.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2029 1st Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Celtics own pick
assetsGivenUp.note: TRUE ORIGIN

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick via ORL
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Orlando in the Noah Penda trade. BOS sent Penda to ORL for Shulga, Amari Williams, 2026 2nd, and 2027 2nd.
assetsGivenUp.note: Received from Orlando, then sent to Chicago in the Vucevic trade.
